Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Impsoing Issue And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Samuel Goldstein, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Glassberg Pollak and Associates
John Mcdonnell, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Ann Lee

Defendant Glassberg Pollack and Associates' motion for order impossing issue and monetary sanctions. Pursuant to stipulation, the motion was heard on April 10, 2007. Defendant's motion for issue and monetary sanctions is denied in part and granted in part. The motion for issue sanctions is denied. The motion for monetary sanctions is granted. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to comply with the prior order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1710 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltfs' Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Geoffrey Munroe for Defendant and moving party: Glassberg Pollak and Associates a Partnership
John P. McDonnell for Plaintiff and opposing party: Ann Lee

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Defendant Glassberg Pollack and Associates' motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents and special interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part.
Request for production
The motion is granted as to requests 2, 4, 5, 8, 10, 11 for the period of August 1, 1998 to August 1, 2000. The motion is denied as to the other requests.
Interrogatories
The motion is granted as to interrogatories 1-7 and 15-17. The motion is denied as to the other requests.
Further responses are to be served within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.

MODIFICATION: Scope of RFP 10, 11 is modified. Plaintiff may redact information un-related to individual plaintiffs. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
